Putting this together, the patient has a mix of inflammation, abscesses, and granulomas.

The fact that the colonoscopy showed some normal areas and some affected areas also fits because Crohn's can be patchy.
I'm also considering other possibilities, like ulcerative colitis, but that usually presents with more diffuse inflammation and blood or mucus in the stool, which isn't mentioned here.
